title: zephyranthes zapotecana
intro: Zephyranthes zapotecana, also known as the Mexican Zephyr Lily or Zapotec Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Zephyranthes zapotecana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
